task: Add MGRS data update to updateSystemStatus function in hi.html

context.existing_mgrs_logic: Lines 1524-1525 contain client-side MGRS calculation using latLonToMGRS function
context.new_mgrs_logic: Added line 1528 to use server-provided MGRS data from data.gps.mgrs
context.note: Both client-side calculation and server-provided MGRS are now present

potential_considerations.duplicate_updates: The gps-mgrs element is now updated twice - once with calculated value (line 1525) and once with server value (line 1528)
potential_considerations.precedence: Server-provided MGRS value will take precedence as it's updated after the calculated value
potential_considerations.fallback: Uses '--' as fallback if data.gps.mgrs is not available
